block.header: aki tu mi kamwi to opo ya sima kuni sira si myesu yamato ne kwo sumyera ga opo mikoto rama to noritamapu opo mikoto wo opo kimi tati omi tati tukasa dukasa no pito domo ame no sita no opo mi takara moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,3@大命乎親王諸王諸臣百官人等天下公民衆聞食宣,*

sentence.transcription: aki tu mi kamwi to
opo ya sima kuni sira si myesu
yamato ne kwo sumyera ga opo mikoto rama to noritamapu

sentence.kanji: 大命乎親王諸王諸臣百官人等天下公民衆聞食宣
sentence.transcription: opo mikoto wo opo kimi tati omi tati tukasa dukasa no pito domo ame no sita no opo mi takara moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

block.header: takama no para ni kamu dumari masu sumyera ga mutu kamu rwoki kamu rwomi no mikoto no wa ga mima no sira sa mu wosu kuni ame no sita to yosasi maturi si manima ni takama no para ni koto pazime te yo mo no wosu kuni ame no sita no maturi goto wo iya taka ni iya piro ni ama tu pi tugi to taka mi kura ni imasite opo ya sima kuni sira si myesu yamato ne kwo sumyera mikoto no opo mikoto ni imase nori tamapa ku ko no wosu kuni ame no sita pa kake maku mo kasikwo ki pudipara no miya ni ame no sita sira si myesi si mimasi no titi to imasu sumyera mikoto no mimasi ni tamapi si ame no sita no waza to noritamapu opo mikoto wo kiki tamape kasikwo mi uke tamapari oso ri masu koto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: CP-FINAL,IP-SUB,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,NP,1@皇親神魯岐神魯美命吾孫将知,*
CP-FINAL,IP-SUB,IP-ADV,NP,2@食国天下止与佐斯奉志,*
CP-FINAL,IP-SUB,3@麻尓々々高天原尓事波自米而,*
CP-FINAL,IP-SUB,PP-GEN,NP,9@倭根子天皇乃大命尓坐詔久此食国天下者掛畏岐,*
CP-FINAL,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,PP,NP,14@大命乎聞食恐美受賜懼理坐,*

sentence.transcription: sumyera ga mutu kamu rwoki kamu rwomi no mikoto no wa ga mima no sira sa mu

sentence.kanji: 皇親神魯岐神魯美命吾孫将知
sentence.transcription: wosu kuni ame no sita to yosasi maturi si

sentence.kanji: 食国天下止与佐斯奉志
sentence.transcription: manima ni

sentence.kanji: 麻尓々々高天原尓事波自米而
sentence.transcription: takama no para ni koto pazime te

sentence.kanji: 四方食国天下乃政乎弥高
sentence.transcription: yo mo no wosu kuni ame no sita no maturi goto wo iya taka ni
iya piro ni
ama tu pi tugi to
taka mi kura ni imasite
opo ya sima kuni sira si myesu

sentence.kanji: 倭根子天皇乃大命尓坐詔久此食国天下者掛畏岐
sentence.transcription: yamato ne kwo sumyera mikoto no opo mikoto ni imase nori tamapa ku ko no wosu kuni ame no sita pa kake maku mo kasikwo ki
pudipara no miya ni ame no sita sira si myesi si
mimasi no titi to imasu
sumyera mikoto no mimasi ni tamapi si
ame no sita no waza to noritamapu

sentence.kanji: 大命乎聞食恐美受賜懼理坐
sentence.transcription: opo mikoto wo kiki tamape kasikwo mi uke tamapari oso ri masu
koto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

block.header: kaku tamap yeru toki ni mimasi mi kwo no yopapi no waka ki ni ni omo ki pa tape zi ka to omoposi masite sumye mi oya to ima si si kake maku mo kasikwo ki wa ga opo kimi sumyera mikoto ni saduke maturi ki

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,2@美麻斯親王乃齡乃弱尓荷重波不堪自加止所念坐而,*

sentence.transcription: kaku tamap yeru
toki ni

sentence.kanji: 美麻斯親王乃齡乃弱尓荷重波不堪自加止所念坐而
sentence.transcription: mimasi mi kwo no yopapi no waka ki ni ni omo ki pa tape zi ka to omoposi masite
sumye mi oya to ima si si
kake maku mo kasikwo ki
wa ga opo kimi sumyera mikoto ni saduke maturi ki

block.header: kore ni yorite ko no nara no opo miya ni aki tu mi kamwi to imasite opo ya sima guni sira si myesite reiki no pazime no tosi ni ko no ama tu pi tugi taka mi kura no waza wosu kuni ame no sita no maturi goto wo ware ni saduke tamapi yuduri tamapite wosipe tamapi nori tamapi turaku kake maku mo kasikwo ki apumi no opo tu no miya ni ame no sita sira si myesi si yamato ne kwo sumyera mikoto no yorodu yo ni aratamu masizi ki tune no nori to tate tamapi siki tama p yeru nori no manima ni noti tupi ni pa a ga kwo ni sadaka ni mukusaka ni ayamatu koto na ku saduke tamapye to opose tamapi nori tamapi si ni imasu apida ni kozo no naga tukwi ame tuti no tamap yeru opo ki sirusi no mono arapare kye ri

comment.raw: CP-FINAL,IP-SUB,0@依行而是平城大宮尓現御神止坐而,*
CP-FINAL,IP-SUB,IP-ADV;@3,3@此乃天日嗣高御座之業食国天下之政乎朕尓授賜譲賜而教賜詔賜都良久,*
CP-FINAL,IP-ADV,11@我子尓佐太加尓牟倶佐加尓無過事授賜止負賜詔賜比志尓坐,*

sentence.kanji: 依行而是平城大宮尓現御神止坐而
sentence.transcription: kore ni yorite ko no nara no opo miya ni aki tu mi kamwi to imasite
opo ya sima guni sira si myesite
reiki no pazime no tosi ni

sentence.kanji: 此乃天日嗣高御座之業食国天下之政乎朕尓授賜譲賜而教賜詔賜都良久
sentence.transcription: ko no ama tu pi tugi taka mi kura no waza wosu kuni ame no sita no maturi goto wo ware ni saduke tamapi yuduri tamapite wosipe tamapi nori tamapi turaku kake maku mo kasikwo ki
apumi no opo tu no miya ni ame no sita sira si myesi si
yamato ne kwo sumyera mikoto no yorodu yo ni
aratamu masizi ki
tune no nori to tate tamapi siki tama p yeru
nori no manima ni
noti tupi ni pa a ga kwo ni sadaka ni mukusaka ni ayamatu koto na ku saduke tamapye to opose tamapi nori tamapi si ni imasu
apida ni

sentence.kanji: 我子尓佐太加尓牟倶佐加尓無過事授賜止負賜詔賜比志尓坐
sentence.transcription: kozo no naga tukwi ame tuti no tamap yeru opo ki
sirusi no mono arapare kye ri

block.header: mata yo mo no wosu kuni no tosi yutaka ni mukusaka ni e tari to mi tamapite kamu nagara mo omoposi myesu ni utusi ku mo sumyera wa ga mi yo ni atarite araparu ru mono ni pa arazi

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@又四方食国乃年実豊尓,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,3@随神母所念行尓于都斯久母,*

sentence.kanji: 又四方食国乃年実豊尓
sentence.transcription: mata yo mo no wosu kuni no tosi yutaka ni
mukusaka ni
e tari to mi tamapite

sentence.kanji: 随神母所念行尓于都斯久母
sentence.transcription: kamu nagara mo omoposi myesu ni utusi ku mo
sumyera wa ga mi yo ni atarite araparu ru
mono ni pa arazi

block.header: ima tugi masa mu mi yo no na wo sirusite kotape kyeri arapare kye ru mono ni aru rasi to omoposi masite ima zinki no puta mozi wo mi yo no na to sadame te yaurau no ya tose aratamete zinki no pazime no tosi to site ama tu pi tugi taka me kura wosu kuni ame no sita no waza wo wa ga kwo mimasi opo kimi ni saduke tamapi yuduri tamapu to noritamapu sumyera ga opo mikoto wo itadaki ni uke tamapari kasikwo mi motite inabwi mawosaba sumyera ga opo mikoto kasikwo ku tamapari tukape maturaba tutana ku wodina kute sir eru koto na si

comment.raw: IP-MAT,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,2@物尓在良志止所念坐而,*
IP-MAT,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,3@今神亀二字御世乃年名止定氐,*
IP-MAT,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,6@天日嗣高御座食国天下之業乎吾子美麻斯王尓授賜,*
IP-MAT,8@天皇大命乎頂受賜恐美,*
IP-MAT,10@天皇大命恐被賜仕奉者拙久劣而,*

sentence.transcription: mi yo no na wo sirusite kotape kyeri arapare kye ru

sentence.kanji: 御世名乎記而応来顕来留
sentence.transcription: mono ni aru rasi to omoposi masite

sentence.kanji: 物尓在良志止所念坐而
sentence.transcription: ima zinki no puta mozi wo mi yo no na to sadame te

sentence.kanji: 今神亀二字御世乃年名止定氐
sentence.transcription: yaurau no ya tose aratamete
zinki no pazime no tosi to site
ama tu pi tugi taka me kura wosu kuni ame no sita no waza wo wa ga kwo mimasi opo kimi ni saduke tamapi

sentence.kanji: 天日嗣高御座食国天下之業乎吾子美麻斯王尓授賜
sentence.transcription: yuduri tamapu to noritamapu
sumyera ga opo mikoto wo itadaki ni uke tamapari kasikwo mi

sentence.kanji: 天皇大命乎頂受賜恐美
sentence.transcription: motite inabwi mawosaba
sumyera ga opo mikoto kasikwo ku tamapari tukape maturaba tutana ku wodina kute

sentence.kanji: 天皇大命恐被賜仕奉者拙久劣而
sentence.transcription: sir eru
koto na si

block.header: susumi mo sira ni sirizoki mo sira ni ame tuti no kokoro mo itapasi ku ikasi ku tukasa dukasa no kokoro mo katazikena mi pazikasi mi namo kamu nagara omoposi masu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,2@天地之心母労久重百官之情母辱愧美奈母,*

sentence.transcription: susumi mo sira ni
sirizoki mo sira ni

sentence.kanji: 天地之心母労久重百官之情母辱愧美奈母
sentence.transcription: ame tuti no kokoro mo itapasi ku ikasi ku tukasa dukasa no kokoro mo katazikena mi pazikasi mi namo
kamu nagara omoposi masu

block.header: kare mi kwo tati wo pazimete opo kimi tati omi tati imasi tati kiywo ki aka ki tadasi ki napo ki kokoro wo motite sumyera ga mikadwo wo anana pi tasuke maturite ame no sita no opo mi takara wo mawosi tamape to noritamapu opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

sentence.transcription: kare mi kwo tati wo pazimete
opo kimi tati omi tati imasi tati kiywo ki aka ki tadasi ki napo ki
kokoro wo motite
sumyera ga mikadwo wo anana pi tasuke maturite
ame no sita no opo mi takara wo mawosi tamape to noritamapu
opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

block.header: koto wakite nori tamapa ku topo sumyeroki no mi yo wo pazimete naka ima ni itaru made ama tu pi tugi to taka mi kura ni imasite ko no wosu kuni ame no sita wo nade tamapi utukusibwi tamapa ku pa toki doki sama zama ni sitagapite wosame tamapi utukusibwi tamapi kuru waza to kamu nagara omoposi mye su

comment.raw: CP-FINAL,IP-SUB,0@辞別詔久遠皇祖御世始而,*
CP-FINAL,IP-ADV,PP-TOP,NP,IP-REL,3@此食国天下乎撫賜慈賜久波時々状々尓従而治賜慈賜来,*

sentence.kanji: 辞別詔久遠皇祖御世始而
sentence.transcription: koto wakite nori tamapa ku topo sumyeroki no mi yo wo pazimete

sentence.kanji: 中今尓至麻氐天日嗣止
sentence.transcription: naka ima ni itaru made ama tu pi tugi to
taka mi kura ni imasite

sentence.kanji: 此食国天下乎撫賜慈賜久波時々状々尓従而治賜慈賜来
sentence.transcription: ko no wosu kuni ame no sita wo nade tamapi utukusibwi tamapa ku pa toki doki sama zama ni sitagapite wosame tamapi utukusibwi tamapi kuru
waza to
kamu nagara omoposi mye su

block.header: koko wo motite madu ame no sita wo utukusibwi tamapi wosame tamapa ku mata tukasa dukasa ni tukape maturu kara pito domo pito ri puta ri ni so no opite tukape maturu be ki kabane na tamapu

comment.raw: CP-FINAL,IP-SUB,0@是以先天下乎慈賜治賜久又官々仕奉,*
CP-FINAL,IP-ADV,NP;@2,1@韓人部一二人尓其負而,*

sentence.kanji: 是以先天下乎慈賜治賜久又官々仕奉
sentence.transcription: koko wo motite madu ame no sita wo utukusibwi tamapi wosame tamapa ku mata tukasa dukasa ni tukape maturu

sentence.kanji: 韓人部一二人尓其負而
sentence.transcription: kara pito domo pito ri puta ri ni so no opite
tukape maturu be ki
kabane na tamapu

block.header: mata tukasa dukasa bito to mi satwo no popusi ama to ni opo mi te tu mono tora si tamapi wosame tamapa ku to noritamapu sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@又百官々人及京下僧尼大御手物取賜治賜久止詔,*

sentence.kanji: 又百官々人及京下僧尼大御手物取賜治賜久止詔
sentence.transcription: mata tukasa dukasa bito to mi satwo no popusi ama to ni opo mi te tu mono tora si tamapi wosame tamapa ku to noritamapu
sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu
